title: Vanilla-EPI
description: A Vanilla themed 32x edit made to give a better overall pvp experience
body:
# VANILLA-EPI 

## [Check out my other packs here!](https://modrinth.com/user/JJ_00_EPICS)

### If your gonna showcase/distrubute any of my packs anywhere e.g youtube, discord then you must use the modrinth link

Vanilla-EPI is a 32x texture pack that reimagines the default Minecraft look with cleaner, sharper visuals—without losing the soul of the original.Textures are upgraded to 32x resolution, providing more detail and polish while staying faithful to the vanilla art style.

Perfect for PvP, survival, or casual play, Vanilla-EPI boosts immersion and style without going overboard. Whether you’re building, exploring, or fighting, this pack keeps Minecraft looking familiar—but better.
